MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Cause to Defendant's Counsel Bruce Burge, for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 8 is heard this day. There being no appearance Bruce Burge, Esq., is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear at the Order to Show Cause Hearing today, and for failure to Pay the Early Settlement Program Administrative Fee. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair. (212)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-04-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
